tagline: Built for investors who hate spreadsheets.
disclaimer: InvesTax is a software tool for investment tax calculation. We are not licensed tax advisors. Calculations are based on Romanian tax legislation valid for tax year {{taxYear}} (declaration filed by {{filingDeadline}}). For complex cases or ANAF audits, consult a licensed accountant. InvesTax assumes no liability for incorrect tax declarations.
disclaimerTaxYear: Calculator valid for tax year {{taxYear}} (declaration filed by {{filingDeadline}}). For tax year {{nextTaxYear}} and later, the tax rate changes per Law 239/2025. InvesTax will be updated before the {{nextFilingYear}} filing season.
disclaimerMethodology: In PDF imports, capital gains are converted to RON at the BNR rate on each transaction date, and dividends at the BNR annual average rate (Codul Fiscal art. 96 and art. 131 para. 6).
